## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Created Vite React TypeScript project with Tailwind CSS
- [x] Customize the Project - Created example components (Header, Button, Card)

- [x] Compile the Project - Dependencies installed successfully, builds without errors

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - README.md created and updated

## Project Details
- **Type**: Vite + React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS
- **Purpose**: Convert HTML design to React components with Tailwind CSS styling
